title: Qwen-RobotWorld: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
summary: Qwen-RobotWorld is a language-conditioned video world model for embodied AI that uses natural language as a unified action interface to forecast future visual sequences across robotic manipulation, autonomous driving, indoor navigation, and human-to-robot transfer. It combines a double-stream diffusion transformer with a multimodal language model, trained on an 8.6M video-text dataset spanning over 200M frames across 20+ embodiments via a progressive curriculum. It is released as part of Alibaba's broader Qwen-RobotSuite announcement.
